rules.description: Use Azure Capacity Reservation for virtual machine (VM) that runs critical workloads. Azure Capacity Reservations reserve compute capacity in a specific region or availability zone.
rules.fix: Use Azure Capacity Reservation for virtual machine (VM) that runs critical workloads

ARM_Fix.details: Add a Microsoft.Compute/capacityReservationGroups resource and a nested Microsoft.Compute/capacityReservationGroups/capacityReservations child resource to the template, then set properties.capacityReservation.capacityReservationGroup.id on the VM to reference the group.

TF_Fix.details: Add an azurerm_capacity_reservation_group resource and an azurerm_capacity_reservation child resource to the Terraform configuration, then set capacity_reservation_group_id on the VM resource to reference the group's id.

rules.description: Migrate production workload from A-series or B-series virtual machine (VM) to D-series or better VM. A-series and B-series VMs are designed for entry-level workloads.
rules.query: where properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize contains 'Standard_B' or properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize contains 'Standard_A'
rules.fix: Migrate production workload from A-series or B-series virtual machine (VM) to D-series or better VM. A-series and B-series VMs are designed for entry-level workloads.

ARM_Fix.details: Deallocate the VM, then update properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize to a D-series or better SKU (e.g., Standard_D4s_v5). Verify image and extension compatibility before redeployment.

TF_Fix.details: Deallocate the VM, then update the size attribute to a D-series or better SKU (e.g., Standard_D4s_v5). Verify image and extension compatibility before redeployment.

rules.description: Azure Virtual Machine (VM) series F, Fs, Fsv2, Lsv2, G, Gs, Av2, and B are retiring. The VM series are no longer available for use or purchase. Applications and workloads currently operating on VM types must be migrated to newer VM series.
rules.query: where tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Lsv2' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_GS' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_G' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Fsv2' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Fs' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_F' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_B' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Av2'

ARM_Fix.details: Deallocate the VM and update properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize to an equivalent current-generation SKU. Recommended replacements by series: F/Fs/Fsv2 (compute-optimized) → Fasv6 or Famsv6; G/GS (memory-heavy) → Msv3 or Mv2; Lsv2 (storage-optimized) → Lsv3 or Lasv3; B (burstable) → Bsv2; Av2 (general-purpose) → Dsv5 or Dpsv5. Verify image and extension compatibility before redeployment.

TF_Fix.details: Deallocate the VM and update the size attribute to an equivalent current-generation SKU. Recommended replacements by series: F/Fs/Fsv2 (compute-optimized) → Fasv6 or Famsv6; G/GS (memory-heavy) → Msv3 or Mv2; Lsv2 (storage-optimized) → Lsv3 or Lasv3; B (burstable) → Bsv2; Av2 (general-purpose) → Dsv5 or Dpsv5. Verify image and extension compatibility before redeployment.

rules.description: Standard_NC24rs_v3 virtual machine size in NCv3-series virtual machines is retiring. Upgrade to the newer VM series in the same NC product line.

ARM_Fix.details: Deallocate the VM and update properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize to a current NC-series equivalent. For general GPU workloads use Standard_NC24ads_A100_v4 (NCads A100 v4 series). For MPI or RDMA-dependent workloads (original 'r' suffix SKUs), use Standard_ND96asr_v4 (NDv4) or Standard_ND96isr_H100_v5 (ND H100 v5) instead, as NC24ads_A100_v4 does not support RDMA. Verify GPU drivers and extension compatibility before redeployment.

TF_Fix.details: Deallocate the VM and update the size attribute to a current NC-series equivalent. For general GPU workloads use Standard_NC24ads_A100_v4. For MPI or RDMA-dependent workloads, use Standard_ND96asr_v4 or Standard_ND96isr_H100_v5. Verify GPU drivers and extension compatibility before redeployment.
